---
title: "Unit 5 - Descriptive Statistics"
---

> Now that we have gotten somewhat more comfortable with wrangling our data and visualizing it, we are going to shift our focus to describing our data. This is always an important step and will begin our journey into inferential statistics.


[Full Screen](slides-speaker.html)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides-speaker.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```


[Full Screen](slides2-speaker.html)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides2-speaker.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
